list.name: asset
list.label: Asset
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT asset FROM pca_residuals ORDER BY asset

panels.title: Total Signals
panels.description: Total PCA signals detected in time range

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) as "Signals" FROM pca_signals WHERE timestamp BETWEEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM $__timeFrom()::timestamptz) * 1000 AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM $__timeTo()::timestamptz) * 1000
SELECT COUNT(*) as "Long" FROM pca_signals WHERE direction = 'long' AND timestamp BETWEEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM $__timeFrom()::timestamptz) * 1000 AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM $__timeTo()::timestamptz) * 1000

SELECT COUNT(*) as "Short" FROM pca_signals WHERE direction = 'short' AND timestamp BETWEEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM $__timeFrom()::timestamptz) * 1000 AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM $__timeTo()::timestamptz) * 1000

panels.title: Signal Accuracy
panels.description: % of resolved signals where z-score moved toward zero

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ABS(exit_z_score) < ABS(z_score)) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 1) as "Accuracy" FROM pca_signals WHERE resolved = true AND timestamp BETWEEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM $__timeFrom()::timestamptz) * 1000 AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM $__timeTo()::timestamptz) * 1000

SELECT ROUND(AVG(hold_time_ms) / 60000, 1) as "Hold Time" FROM pca_signals WHERE resolved = true AND timestamp BETWEEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM $__timeFrom()::timestamptz) * 1000 AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM $__timeTo()::timestamptz) * 1000

panels.title: Variance Explained
panels.description: Latest factor model variance explained by PC1+PC2

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND((variance_explained[array_length(variance_explained, 1)] * 100)::numeric, 1) as "Variance" FROM pca_factor_models ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 1

panels.title: Total P&L (bps)
panels.description: Sum of realized P&L from closed signals

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(pnl_bps), 0)::numeric, 1) as "P&L" FROM pca_signals WHERE resolved = true AND pnl_bps IS NOT NULL AND timestamp BETWEEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM $__timeFrom()::timestamptz) * 1000 AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM $__timeTo()::timestamptz) * 1000

panels.title: Realized P&L ($)
panels.description: Total profit from closed signals

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(pnl_usd), 0)::numeric, 2) as "Realized" FROM pca_signals WHERE resolved = true AND timestamp BETWEEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM $__timeFrom()::timestamptz) * 1000 AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM $__timeTo()::timestamptz) * 1000

panels.title: Win Rate
panels.description: % of closed signals with positive P&L

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE pnl_bps > 0) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 1) as "Win Rate" FROM pca_signals WHERE resolved = true AND pnl_bps IS NOT NULL AND timestamp BETWEEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM $__timeFrom()::timestamptz) * 1000 AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM $__timeTo()::timestamptz) * 1000

SELECT ROUND(COALESCE(AVG(pnl_bps), 0)::numeric, 1) as "Avg P&L" FROM pca_signals WHERE resolved = true AND pnl_bps IS NOT NULL AND timestamp BETWEEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM $__timeFrom()::timestamptz) * 1000 AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM $__timeTo()::timestamptz) * 1000

panels.title: Capital Deployed
panels.description: Total notional USD in open positions

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(position_size_usd), 0) as "Deployed" FROM pca_signals WHERE resolved = false

panels.title: Unrealized P&L (bps)
panels.description: Position-weighted unrealized return of open positions

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN entry_price > 0 AND current_price > 0 THEN position_size_usd * (CASE direction WHEN 'long' THEN (current_price - entry_price) / entry_price WHEN 'short' THEN (entry_price - current_price) / entry_price END) ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(position_size_usd), 0) * 10000, 0)::numeric, 1) as "Unrealized" FROM pca_signals WHERE resolved = false

panels.title: Unrealized P&L ($)
panels.description: Mark-to-market P&L in USD

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN entry_price > 0 AND current_price > 0 THEN position_size_usd * (CASE direction WHEN 'long' THEN (current_price - entry_price) / entry_price WHEN 'short' THEN (entry_price - current_price) / entry_price END) ELSE 0 END), 0)::numeric, 2) as "Unrealized" FROM pca_signals WHERE resolved = false

panels.title: Signal P&L (Gross)
panels.description: Gross theoretical P&L from pca_signals (no cost adjustment)

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(pnl_usd), 0)::numeric, 2) as "Gross P&L" FROM pca_signals WHERE resolved = true AND pnl_usd IS NOT NULL

panels.title: Signal P&L (Net)
panels.description: Cost-adjusted P&L subtracting $cost_bps bps round-trip per trade

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND(COALESCE(SUM((pnl_bps - ${cost_bps}) * position_size_usd / 10000), 0)::numeric, 2) as "Net P&L" FROM pca_signals WHERE resolved = true AND pnl_bps IS NOT NULL

panels.title: Execution P&L (All-Time)
panels.description: Actual P&L from perps_executions table

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(realized_pnl), 0)::numeric, 2) as "Exec P&L" FROM perps_executions WHERE status = 'closed'

panels.title: Signal P&L Today (Gross)
panels.description: Gross theoretical P&L for today

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(pnl_usd), 0)::numeric, 2) as "Gross" FROM pca_signals WHERE resolved = true AND pnl_usd IS NOT NULL AND to_timestamp(timestamp / 1000)::date = CURRENT_DATE

panels.title: Signal P&L Today (Net)
panels.description: Cost-adjusted P&L for today subtracting $cost_bps bps round-trip

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND(COALESCE(SUM((pnl_bps - ${cost_bps}) * position_size_usd / 10000), 0)::numeric, 2) as "Net" FROM pca_signals WHERE resolved = true AND pnl_bps IS NOT NULL AND to_timestamp(timestamp / 1000)::date = CURRENT_DATE

panels.title: Execution P&L (Today)
panels.description: Actual P&L for today

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(realized_pnl), 0)::numeric, 2) as "Exec" FROM perps_executions WHERE status = 'closed' AND created_at::date = CURRENT_DATE

panels.title: P&L by Direction
panels.description: Total USD P&L split by long vs short

targets.rawSql: SELECT direction as "Direction", ROUND(SUM(pnl_usd)::numeric, 2) as "P&L ($)" FROM pca_signals WHERE resolved = true AND pnl_usd IS NOT NULL GROUP BY direction ORDER BY direction

panels.title: Cumulative P&L (USD)
panels.description: Running total of USD P&L over time

targets.rawSql: SELECT to_timestamp(timestamp / 1000) as time, SUM(pnl_usd) OVER (ORDER BY timestamp) as "Cumulative P&L ($)" FROM pca_signals WHERE resolved = true AND pnl_usd IS NOT NULL ORDER BY timestamp

panels.title: Daily P&L Table
panels.description: Daily breakdown of P&L with trade counts and win rate

targets.rawSql: SELECT to_char(to_timestamp(timestamp / 1000) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC', 'YYYY-MM-DD') as "Day", COUNT(*) as "Trades", ROUND(SUM(pnl_usd)::numeric, 2) as "P&L ($)", ROUND(SUM((pnl_bps - ${cost_bps}) * position_size_usd / 10000)::numeric, 2) as "Net P&L ($)", ROUND(AVG(pnl_usd)::numeric, 4) as "Avg P&L ($)", ROUND(SUM(pnl_bps)::numeric, 0) as "P&L (bps)", ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE pnl_bps > 0) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 1) as "Win Rate %" FROM pca_signals WHERE resolved = true AND pnl_usd IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1 DESC

panels.title: P&L by Asset
panels.description: Total USD P&L per asset sorted by P&L

targets.rawSql: SELECT asset as "Asset", COUNT(*) as "Trades", ROUND(SUM(pnl_usd)::numeric, 2) as "P&L ($)", ROUND(AVG(pnl_usd)::numeric, 4) as "Avg ($)", ROUND(SUM(pnl_bps)::numeric, 0) as "P&L (bps)" FROM pca_signals WHERE resolved = true AND pnl_usd IS NOT NULL GROUP BY asset ORDER BY SUM(pnl_usd) DESC

panels.title: P&L by Exit Reason (Signals)
panels.description: Performance breakdown by exit type

targets.rawSql: SELECT exit_reason as "Exit Reason", COUNT(*) as "Trades", ROUND(SUM(pnl_usd)::numeric, 2) as "P&L ($)", ROUND(SUM((pnl_bps - ${cost_bps}) * position_size_usd / 10000)::numeric, 2) as "Net P&L ($)", ROUND(AVG(pnl_usd)::numeric, 4) as "Avg ($)", ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE pnl_bps > 0) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 1) as "Win %" FROM pca_signals WHERE resolved = true AND pnl_usd IS NOT NULL GROUP BY exit_reason ORDER BY SUM(pnl_usd) DESC

panels.title: Execution P&L by Run
panels.description: Actual P&L from perps_executions by run_id

targets.rawSql: SELECT run_id as "Run", mode as "Mode", COUNT(*) as "Trades", COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE exit_reason = 'trailing_stop') as "Trailing", COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE exit_reason = 'stop_loss') as "Stopped", ROUND(SUM(realized_pnl)::numeric, 2) as "P&L ($)", ROUND(AVG(realized_pnl)::numeric, 2) as "Avg ($)", ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE realized_pnl > 0) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 1) as "Win %" FROM perps_executions WHERE status = 'closed' GROUP BY run_id, mode ORDER BY MAX(created_at) DESC

panels.title: Execution P&L by Exit Reason
panels.description: Actual execution performance by exit type

targets.rawSql: SELECT exit_reason as "Exit Reason", COUNT(*) as "Trades", ROUND(SUM(realized_pnl)::numeric, 2) as "P&L ($)", ROUND(AVG(realized_pnl)::numeric, 2) as "Avg ($)", ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE realized_pnl > 0) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 1) as "Win %" FROM perps_executions WHERE status = 'closed' GROUP BY exit_reason ORDER BY SUM(realized_pnl) DESC

panels.title: Cumulative Execution P&L (USD)
panels.description: Running total of actual P&L from executions

targets.rawSql: SELECT created_at as time, SUM(realized_pnl) OVER (ORDER BY created_at) as "Execution P&L ($)" FROM perps_executions WHERE status = 'closed' ORDER BY created_at

SELECT to_timestamp(timestamp / 1000) as time, asset, z_score FROM pca_residuals WHERE timestamp BETWEEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM $__timeFrom()::timestamptz) * 1000 AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM $__timeTo()::timestamptz) * 1000 AND ('${asset}' = 'all' OR asset = ANY(string_to_array('${asset}', ','))) ORDER BY timestamp

SELECT to_timestamp(timestamp / 1000) as time, asset, residual * 10000 as "Residual (bps)" FROM pca_residuals WHERE timestamp BETWEEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM $__timeFrom()::timestamptz) * 1000 AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM $__timeTo()::timestamptz) * 1000 AND ('${asset}' = 'all' OR asset = ANY(string_to_array('${asset}', ','))) ORDER BY timestamp

SELECT to_timestamp(timestamp / 1000) as "Time", asset as "Asset", direction as "Direction", ROUND(z_score::numeric, 2) as "Entry Z", ROUND(exit_z_score::numeric, 2) as "Exit Z", ROUND(COALESCE(hold_time_ms / 60000.0, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - to_timestamp(timestamp / 1000))) / 60)::numeric, 1) as "Hold (min)", CASE WHEN resolved THEN 'Closed' ELSE 'Open' END as "Status", ROUND(CASE WHEN resolved THEN pnl_bps WHEN entry_price > 0 AND current_price > 0 THEN CASE direction WHEN 'long' THEN ((current_price - entry_price) / entry_price) * 10000 WHEN 'short' THEN ((entry_price - current_price) / entry_price) * 10000 END END::numeric, 1) as "P&L (bps)", ROUND((residual * 10000)::numeric, 2) as "Residual (bps)", ROUND((pc1_return * 10000)::numeric, 2) as "PC1 (bps)" FROM pca_signals WHERE timestamp BETWEEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM $__timeFrom()::timestamptz) * 1000 AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM $__timeTo()::timestamptz) * 1000 ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 30

SELECT asset as "Asset", COUNT(*)::float as "Count" FROM pca_signals WHERE timestamp BETWEEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM $__timeFrom()::timestamptz) * 1000 AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM $__timeTo()::timestamptz) * 1000 GROUP BY asset ORDER BY "Count" DESC

SELECT direction as "Direction", COUNT(*)::float as "Count" FROM pca_signals WHERE timestamp BETWEEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM $__timeFrom()::timestamptz) * 1000 AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM $__timeTo()::timestamptz) * 1000 GROUP BY direction
SELECT asset, direction, total_signals, resolved_signals, avg_hold_min, avg_entry_zscore, avg_exit_zscore, correct_direction, accuracy_pct FROM v_pca_signal_performance

panels.title: Latest Factor Loadings (PC1)
panels.description: Current PC1 loadings for each asset - represents market sensitivity

targets.rawSql: SELECT to_timestamp(timestamp / 1000) as "Model Time", num_factors as "Factors", ROUND((variance_explained[1] * 100)::numeric, 1) as "PC1 Var %", ROUND((variance_explained[2] * 100)::numeric, 1) as "PC2 Var %", pc1_loadings as "PC1 Loadings" FROM pca_factor_models ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 5

panels.title: Daily Sharpe Ratio
panels.description: Avg daily return / stddev of daily returns (annualized = x sqrt(365))

targets.rawSql: WITH hourly AS (SELECT date_trunc('hour', to_timestamp(exit_timestamp / 1000)) AS hour, SUM(pnl_bps) AS hourly_pnl FROM pca_signals WHERE resolved = true AND pnl_bps IS NOT NULL AND exit_timestamp BETWEEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM $__timeFrom()::timestamptz) * 1000 AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM $__timeTo()::timestamptz) * 1000 GROUP BY 1), daily AS (SELECT date_trunc('day', hour) AS day, SUM(hourly_pnl) AS daily_pnl FROM hourly GROUP BY 1) SELECT ROUND(COALESCE(AVG(daily_pnl) / NULLIF(STDDEV(daily_pnl), 0), 0)::numeric, 2) AS "Sharpe" FROM daily

panels.title: Max Drawdown (bps)
panels.description: Worst peak-to-trough decline in cumulative P&L

targets.rawSql: WITH cum AS (SELECT exit_timestamp, SUM(pnl_bps) OVER (ORDER BY exit_timestamp) AS cum_pnl FROM pca_signals WHERE resolved = true AND pnl_bps IS NOT NULL AND exit_timestamp BETWEEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM $__timeFrom()::timestamptz) * 1000 AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM $__timeTo()::timestamptz) * 1000), dd AS (SELECT cum_pnl - MAX(cum_pnl) OVER (ORDER BY exit_timestamp) AS drawdown FROM cum) SELECT ROUND(COALESCE(MIN(drawdown), 0)::numeric, 1) AS "Max DD" FROM dd

panels.title: Profit Factor
panels.description: Sum of winning trades / abs(sum of losing trades). Want > 1.5

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(pnl_bps) FILTER (WHERE pnl_bps > 0) / NULLIF(ABS(SUM(pnl_bps) FILTER (WHERE pnl_bps < 0)), 0), 0)::numeric, 2) AS "Profit Factor" FROM pca_signals WHERE resolved = true AND pnl_bps IS NOT NULL AND exit_timestamp BETWEEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM $__timeFrom()::timestamptz) * 1000 AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM $__timeTo()::timestamptz) * 1000

panels.title: Win/Loss Ratio
panels.description: Avg winning trade size / avg losing trade size

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND(COALESCE(AVG(pnl_bps) FILTER (WHERE pnl_bps > 0) / NULLIF(ABS(AVG(pnl_bps) FILTER (WHERE pnl_bps < 0)), 0), 0)::numeric, 2) AS "W/L Ratio" FROM pca_signals WHERE resolved = true AND pnl_bps IS NOT NULL AND exit_timestamp BETWEEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM $__timeFrom()::timestamptz) * 1000 AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM $__timeTo()::timestamptz) * 1000

panels.title: Longest Losing Streak
panels.description: Max consecutive trades with pnl_bps <= 0

targets.rawSql: WITH ordered AS (SELECT pnl_bps, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY exit_timestamp) AS rn, CASE WHEN pnl_bps <= 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_loss FROM pca_signals WHERE resolved = true AND pnl_bps IS NOT NULL AND exit_timestamp BETWEEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM $__timeFrom()::timestamptz) * 1000 AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM $__timeTo()::timestamptz) * 1000), streaks AS (SELECT is_loss, rn - ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY is_loss ORDER BY rn) AS grp FROM ordered), streak_lengths AS (SELECT COUNT(*) AS streak_len FROM streaks WHERE is_loss = 1 GROUP BY grp) SELECT COALESCE(MAX(streak_len), 0) AS "Streak" FROM streak_lengths

panels.title: Time to Recovery
panels.description: Minutes from max drawdown trough back to previous peak

targets.rawSql: WITH cum AS (SELECT exit_timestamp, SUM(pnl_bps) OVER (ORDER BY exit_timestamp) AS cum_pnl FROM pca_signals WHERE resolved = true AND pnl_bps IS NOT NULL AND exit_timestamp BETWEEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM $__timeFrom()::timestamptz) * 1000 AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM $__timeTo()::timestamptz) * 1000), with_peak AS (SELECT exit_timestamp, cum_pnl, MAX(cum_pnl) OVER (ORDER BY exit_timestamp) AS peak, cum_pnl - MAX(cum_pnl) OVER (ORDER BY exit_timestamp) AS drawdown FROM cum), max_dd AS (SELECT MIN(drawdown) AS worst_dd FROM with_peak), trough_point AS (SELECT exit_timestamp AS trough_ts, peak AS trough_peak FROM with_peak, max_dd WHERE with_peak.drawdown = max_dd.worst_dd ORDER BY exit_timestamp LIMIT 1), recovery_point AS (SELECT MIN(c.exit_timestamp) AS recovery_ts FROM cum c, trough_point t WHERE c.exit_timestamp > t.trough_ts AND c.cum_pnl >= t.trough_peak) SELECT CASE WHEN (SELECT recovery_ts FROM recovery_point) IS NOT NULL THEN ROUND((((SELECT recovery_ts FROM recovery_point) - t.trough_ts) / 60000.0)::numeric, 1) ELSE NULL END AS "Recovery" FROM trough_point t

panels.title: Cumulative P&L & Drawdown
panels.description: Cumulative P&L curve with drawdown from peak shown below

targets.rawSql: WITH cum AS (SELECT to_timestamp(exit_timestamp / 1000) AS time, SUM(pnl_bps) OVER (ORDER BY exit_timestamp) AS "Cumulative P&L (bps)" FROM pca_signals WHERE resolved = true AND pnl_bps IS NOT NULL AND exit_timestamp BETWEEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM $__timeFrom()::timestamptz) * 1000 AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM $__timeTo()::timestamptz) * 1000) SELECT time, "Cumulative P&L (bps)" FROM cum ORDER BY time

WITH cum AS (SELECT to_timestamp(exit_timestamp / 1000) AS time, SUM(pnl_bps) OVER (ORDER BY exit_timestamp) AS cum_pnl FROM pca_signals WHERE resolved = true AND pnl_bps IS NOT NULL AND exit_timestamp BETWEEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM $__timeFrom()::timestamptz) * 1000 AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM $__timeTo()::timestamptz) * 1000) SELECT time, cum_pnl - MAX(cum_pnl) OVER (ORDER BY time) AS "Drawdown (bps)" FROM cum ORDER BY time

panels.title: Shadow vs Real Exit Comparison
panels.description: Compare real exit P&L with shadow (hold-longer) P&L to evaluate if exits are premature

targets.rawSql: SELECT entry_time, asset, direction, exit_reason, real_pnl_bps, real_mfe_bps, real_mae_bps, real_hold_min, shadow_pnl_bps, shadow_mfe_bps, shadow_mae_bps, shadow_hold_min, shadow_exit_reason, shadow_vs_real_bps, shadow_better FROM v_pca_mae_mfe LIMIT 50

panels.title: Stop Analysis: Do Stopped Trades Recover?
panels.description: For trades exited by stop-loss, did the shadow position recover? Helps tune stop levels.

targets.rawSql: SELECT real_exit_reason, direction, total_trades, real_winners, real_win_pct, shadow_winners, shadow_win_pct, avg_real_pnl, avg_shadow_pnl, avg_improvement_bps, shadow_better_count, shadow_better_pct FROM v_pca_stop_analysis

panels.title: MAE Distribution (Real vs Shadow)
panels.description: Maximum Adverse Excursion bucketed by exit reason — how deep did trades go before exiting?

targets.rawSql: SELECT direction, exit_reason, trades, mae_0_25, mae_25_50, mae_50_100, mae_100_150, mae_gt_150, mae_p5_bps, mae_p25_bps, mae_p50_bps FROM v_pca_mae_distribution

panels.title: Shadow P&L Attribution
panels.description: How much P&L came from factor (PC1) vs residual in shadow positions

targets.rawSql: SELECT direction, real_exit_reason, shadow_exit_reason, trades, winner_pc1_bps, winner_residual_bps, loser_pc1_bps, loser_residual_bps, residual_driven_winners, pc1_driven_winners FROM v_pca_shadow_driver
